app.title: Your tunnels
app.subtitle: Create WireGuard tunnels, view QR codes and send configs to Telegram chat.
profile.title: Profile
list.title: Tunnel list
list.emptyBody: Create your first tunnel and it will appear here.
qr.title: QR code
qr.body: Scan it in WireGuard or AmneziaVPN to import configuration.
dialog.deleteBody: The config will be removed from both the app and wg-easy.
fallback.title: Open the app inside Telegram
fallback.body: This interface works only as a Telegram Mini App. Open the bot and launch the app there.
